_comment: Idea bank mined by the weekly /research-tiktok agent from high-performing posts. Templated for adaptation, niche-tagged. Seeded 2026-05-29 from 4 public accounts; 2026-05-30 added optional `performance` (view_index = views / account median, engagement_rate) so the runtime ranking prefers ideas that actually performed. Bumping `version` requires bumping CONTENT_PLAN_PROMPT_VERSION.

ideas.idea: a very curated guide to the best places to indulge in [your city], framed as a save-for-later list
ideas.hook_pattern: my very curated [city] guide — save this
ideas.filming_context: fast cuts of each spot, warm natural light, on-screen place names

ideas.pillar: a perfect day in the city
ideas.idea: a perfect day in [your city] told as a morning-to-night montage of small rituals
ideas.filming_context: POV handheld, golden-hour bookends, one clip per moment

ideas.idea: your [season] outfit rotation — a handful of repeatable, minimal looks
ideas.filming_context: mirror or tripod, quick outfit-change cuts on the beat

ideas.idea: a single striking clip captioned with the 'experiences > savings' philosophy
ideas.filming_context: one hero wide shot of a view or climb, minimal text

ideas.idea: a 'core memory' recap of one experience you'll never forget
ideas.filming_context: montage of the day, sentimental sound, slow final hold

ideas.idea: document a milestone (2nd 10k run, first hike) framed as getting braver
ideas.filming_context: first-person, candid, show the effort not just the result

ideas.idea: a countdown post: how many days until your product drops, with one detail teased
ideas.filming_context: hands-on product b-roll, bold countdown number on screen

ideas.idea: the big reveal of what you've been making, with genuine surprise/relief energy
ideas.filming_context: open/unbox on camera, real reaction, tight on the product

ideas.idea: a confident 'it's live' post pointing people to where they can buy
ideas.hook_pattern: i'm standing on business — it's live
ideas.filming_context: to-camera, short, clear call to where it sells

ideas.idea: a short mood b-roll diary that captures a feeling more than an event
ideas.filming_context: 3-5 unhurried clips, trending soft sound, minimal or no text

ideas.idea: the spot in [your city] nobody tells you about, framed as insider knowledge
ideas.filming_context: reveal shot of the place, name on screen, save prompt

ideas.pillar: a perfect day in the city
ideas.idea: a single short clip of a striking moment in [destination], captioned to create selective resonance with anyone who has been or wants to go
ideas.filming_context: 5-10s hero moment, wide or intimate, let the place carry it — no narration needed

ideas.idea: a morning sensory moment in [your city] — coffee, light, a quiet ritual — that makes the place feel alive
ideas.filming_context: 7-10s, natural morning light, one sensory detail close-up

ideas.idea: the moment you decided to create [your product] because the exact thing you wanted didn't exist — told from frustration to first step
ideas.hook_pattern: i couldn't find [x] anywhere — so i made it from scratch
ideas.filming_context: talking-head or b-roll of the gap, honest and personal, no polish needed

ideas.idea: the unexpected difficulty of naming your [product or brand] — the false starts, the constraints, the moment it finally clicked
ideas.hook_pattern: nobody told me naming a [thing] would be this hard
ideas.filming_context: candid to-camera, show the struggle honestly, let the relief at the end land

ideas.idea: a sunrise hike reveal — the effort it took to get there followed by the moment the view pays off
ideas.filming_context: timelapse or quick cuts of the climb, hold on the sunrise payoff — let it breathe

ideas.idea: a single raw action clip from an extreme or high-stakes moment, captioned with one self-deprecating line that names exactly how you felt
ideas.hook_pattern: i was NOT ready for this
ideas.filming_context: GoPro or handheld — capture the raw moment, no edit polish needed; the humor is in the gap between the epic setting and your honest reaction

ideas.idea: post your single most visually powerful clip and let it be the answer to a question you never state — the caption IS the conclusion
ideas.filming_context: one hero shot — wide vista, a summit, an arrival — that visually speaks for itself with no explanation needed

ideas.idea: document one specific chapter of your brand build as a standalone episode in a named series — each video covers a single decision or milestone in the journey
ideas.filming_context: candid to-camera or b-roll of the moment it happened; each video should be satisfying alone but reward people who follow the whole arc

ideas.idea: a short artful clip inside a gallery, museum, or cultural landmark in your city — one striking installation or work — captioned with a single thoughtful observation
ideas.hook_pattern: the [artwork/exhibit] nobody is talking about in [city]
ideas.filming_context: slow pan or still hold on the work, natural museum light, respectful framing — let the art occupy the frame

ideas.idea: a 6-10s minimal clip from your workday in [city] — just the outfit and where you're going, no narration needed
ideas.filming_context: mirror or building exterior, natural light, 6-10s, single look — the brevity IS the format; don't add explanation

ideas.idea: a short clip of a beautiful place or lifestyle moment, captioned as the parallel life you want — lets the viewer project themselves into it
ideas.hook_pattern: in another life this is my reality
ideas.filming_context: 15-30s of an aspirational scene — a city café, a mountain trail, a dream apartment — let it breathe; no narration needed

ideas.idea: what you wore to [context] as someone who doesn't [expected identity or label] — the relatable twist that reframes the outfit
ideas.hook_pattern: what I wore to [context] as someone who doesn't [surprising qualifier]
ideas.filming_context: 7-10s mirror or tripod clip; single outfit, natural light; the hook lives in the caption, not voice-over — brevity is the format

ideas.idea: admit a small but relatable defeat — 'gave up and just [obvious thing]' — over a travel or lifestyle moment that still looks beautiful
ideas.hook_pattern: gave up and [admitted the easy path]
ideas.filming_context: 5-10s single clip of the moment you gave up; let the visual be beautiful, let the caption carry the punchline — contrast between the beautiful setting and the defeat is the hook

ideas.idea: a short clip where you share one mindset shift that quietly changed how you move through the day — spoken directly to camera, no filter
ideas.hook_pattern: the effect of your thoughts on your life is [outcome]
ideas.filming_context: 60-90s direct-to-camera in good natural light; one idea, one story, no cuts; personal and conversational — the rawness is the hook
